title: About Us
hero_subtitle: The story behind Ria Art Jewellery
body:
Ria Art Jewellery was born from a love of Indian craftsmanship and a desire to make beautiful, handcrafted jewellery accessible to every woman who celebrates her traditions.

Based in Malad West, Mumbai, we create jewellery that bridges the gap between heritage and contemporary style. Every piece in our collection is handcrafted by skilled artisans who bring years of tradition to their craft.

From grand bridal sets to delicate everyday pieces, our collection spans every occasion — weddings, festivals, receptions, and beyond. We believe that the right jewellery doesn't just complete an outfit — it tells your story.
meta_description: Learn about Ria Art Jewellery — a Mumbai-based handcrafted jewellery brand specialising in bridal and festive jewellery.
